topic: 5 GitHub repos everyone's watching right now
caption: 5 GitHub repos absolutely blowing up right now, one of them went from 9K to 380K+ stars in a few months 🤯 Save this and go star your favorite.

slides.headline: OpenClaw
slides.body: Your own personal AI assistant, any OS. Went from 9K to 380K+ stars in a few months, one of the fastest-growing open source projects ever.

slides.headline: Langflow
slides.body: A visual, drag-and-drop builder for AI agents and workflows. No-code way to prototype what you'd otherwise write by hand.

slides.headline: Dify
slides.body: A production-ready platform for building and deploying agentic workflows, the infra layer teams reach for once a prototype needs to ship.

slides.headline: Firecrawl
slides.body: Turns any website into clean markdown or structured JSON for AI agents. If your agent needs to read the web, this is how.

slides.headline: CrewAI
slides.body: A framework for orchestrating role-playing autonomous agents that collaborate on complex tasks, multiple agents, one crew.

slides.headline: Save this before you lose it
slides.body: Which one are you starring first?
